deltas.releaseNoteText: A new `setActivityDebounceTime(time)` method on `CrdtElement` controls how long CRDT editor keystrokes are batched before a single activity record is flushed. The default is 10 minutes; the minimum enforced value is 10 seconds (10,000 ms).
deltas.summary: Create a new rule documenting setActivityDebounceTime(time) on CrdtElement — a method that controls how long CRDT editor keystrokes are batched before a single activity record is flushed, with a default of 10 minutes and an enforced minimum of 10 seconds (10,000 ms).

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Debounce interval in milliseconds. Default: 600000 (10 minutes). Minimum enforced: 10000 (10 seconds).

deltas.releaseNoteText: Exported constant objects (`CommentActivityActionTypes`, `RecorderActivityActionTypes`, `ReactionActivityActionTypes`, `CrdtActivityActionTypes`) and their union types provide type-safe action type values for use in [`ActivitySubscribeConfig`](/api-reference/sdk/models/data-models#activitysubscribeconfig) filters and custom activity creation. Use these instead of raw strings when filtering by `actionTypes`.
deltas.summary: Create a new rule documenting the CrdtActivityActionTypes exported constant object and its corresponding CrdtActivityActionType union type, which provide type-safe actionType values for filtering CRDT activities via ActivitySubscribeConfig instead of raw strings.
deltas.ambiguityNote: The release note confirms CrdtActivityActionTypes exists and is used in ActionSubscribeConfig.actionTypes filters, but does not enumerate the exact member names for the CRDT variant (only CommentActivityActionTypes.ANNOTATION_ADD and CommentActivityActionTypes.STATUS_CHANGE are shown as examples). Exact member names should be verified from SDK source before finalizing the rule.

deltas.summary: Create a new rule documenting the CommentActivityActionTypes exported constant object and its corresponding CommentActivityActionType union type, which provide type-safe actionType values (including ANNOTATION_ADD, STATUS_CHANGE, and others) for filtering comment activities via ActivitySubscribeConfig instead of raw strings.
deltas.ambiguityNote: The release note confirms CommentActivityActionTypes exists and shows ANNOTATION_ADD and STATUS_CHANGE as example members, but states the full member list should be verified from SDK source. Confidence is medium because the two shown members are explicit, but additional members are unconfirmed.

reason: Release contains no API or behavior changes for the Notifications skill. The new Activity feature is a distinct top-level feature category, not an extension of Notifications, and no existing Notifications APIs were modified.
